# FOODLAW.ai

> AI-powered platform for food law professionals, combining over 15 years of legal expertise with artificial intelligence.

## About

FOODLAW.ai is created by Tomasz Krawczyk, a Polish lawyer specializing in food law with over 15 years of professional experience. The platform provides AI-assisted tools for analyzing EU and Polish food law regulations, case law, and health claims.

## Core Facts

- Founded by: Tomasz Krawczyk (lawyer, food law specialist)
- Domain: foodlaw.ai
- Specialization: EU and Polish food law
- Coverage: 19+ areas of food law regulation
- Regulations processed: over 20 EU regulations, Polish statutes, and executive acts
- Case law sources: NSA, WSA, CJEU (TSUE), GIS decisions
- Languages: Polish (primary), English

## Projects

### app.foodlaw.ai (Claims)
URL: https://app.foodlaw.ai
Description: Search engine and analysis tool for EU nutrition and health claims regulated under Regulation 1924/2006.

### Nutrimetr
URL: https://nutrimetr.foodlaw.ai
Description: Food and food law analysis tool for ingredient verification, label compliance checks, and regulatory compliance assessment.

### AI Assistant (supplemental.pl)
URL: https://www.supplemental.pl
Description: AI assistant providing answers to food law questions, available on supplemental.pl.

### ODS AI
Description: AI assistant for preparing appeals against Polish sanitary inspection authority (Sanepid) decisions in food law matters.

### foodlaw.ai GitHub Repository
URL: https://github.com/tomaszkrawczyk-cmd/foodlaw.ai
Description: Open-source collection of food law resources including EU regulations, Polish statutes, case law, and AI skill definitions.

## Areas of Expertise

- Dietary supplements (suplementy diety)
- Novel food (nowa zywnosc)
- Health and nutrition claims (oswiadczenia zdrowotne i zywieniowe)
- Food labeling (znakowanie zywnosci)
- Food safety (bezpieczenstwo zywnosci)
- RASFF (Rapid Alert System for Food and Feed)
- Food additives (dodatki do zywnosci)
- Food contact materials
- GMO regulations
- Organic food regulations
- Food fraud prevention
- Import/export regulations
- HACCP and food hygiene
- Allergen management
- Infant and baby food
- Food supplements notification (Poland)
- EU food law (General Food Law Regulation 178/2002)
- Polish food law (ustawa o bezpieczenstwie zywnosci i zywienia)
- Regulation 1924/2006 (health claims)
- Regulation 2015/2283 (novel food)

## Key Differentiators

- Speed: AI processes regulations instantly, reducing research time from hours to seconds.
- Experience: Over 15 years of specialized food law practice combined with AI.
- Competitive pricing: AI automation enables lower costs without sacrificing quality.
- Comprehensive coverage: 19+ areas of food law, EU and Polish regulations.

## Contact

Website: https://foodlaw.ai
Related: https://www.supplemental.pl
